current_run.problem_name: Hidden XOR of Cyclically Shifted Quadratic Terms
current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes f(x) = (x_0*x_1 + x_1*x_2 + ... + x_{N-2}*x_{N-1} + x_{N-1}*x_0) XOR (x_0*x_2 + x_1*x_3 + ... + x_{N-1}*x_1) mod 2, where the second term is cyclically shifted by 2 bits relative to the first, find the secret coefficients of the quadratic terms.
